name: Veazy Seal Ring Set
summary: Veazy Seal Ring Set — a cleaning accessory for keeping your device clean for purer vapour.
description: The Veazy Seal Ring Set includes all the essential sealing rings and components required to maintain optimal airtight performance for your Veazy Vaporiser. Designed by Storz & Bickel, these OEM parts ensure consistent vapour quality and extend the life of your device. A clean device gives cleaner vapour and a more reliable dose.
